Verified in verifier.py (line 42: bg_thresh = metadata.get('background_threshold', 230)). Value is used to detect white background by checking RGB values > 230. Appropriate since pure white is RGB(255,255,255).

pi_items.verified_value: 226–3071 HU (project file format) vs 226–3021 HU (user guide)
pi_items.source: InVesalius documentation contradiction: User guide (https://invesalius.github.io/docs/user_guide/user_guide.html) documents Bone preset as 226–3021 HU. Project file format wiki (https://github.com/invesalius/invesalius3/wiki/InVesalius-3-Project-file-format) shows mask example with [226, 3071]. Task.json uses 3071 which matches project file format but contradicts user guide documentation.

Verified in env.json line 107: User 'ga' has password 'password123' in user_accounts configuration.
Verified from install_invesalius.sh and setup_invesalius.sh. Official GitHub repository: https://github.com/invesalius/invesalius3. Uses v3.0 release data.
Direct verification: HTTP HEAD request confirms file exists (302 redirect to release-assets.githubusercontent.com). Referenced in setup_invesalius.sh line 73. Official InVesalius GitHub v3.0 release.

CT Cranium dataset is a demonstration/sample dataset distributed with InVesalius for educational and testing purposes, not real patient data. Confirmed by its inclusion as downloadable sample data in official releases.

privileged_info_summary: Task uses InVesalius 3 with a public CT Cranium DICOM dataset (0051.zip from v3.0 release at https://github.com/invesalius/invesalius3/releases/download/v3.0/0051.zip). Output should be written to /home/ga/Documents/skull_frontal_pub.png. Login credentials are username 'ga' with password 'password123' (from env.json). The bone segmentation preset uses 226–3071 HU threshold range, which matches InVesalius project file format examples. Background detection uses threshold of 230 for white (RGB > 230). The dataset is synthetic (sample data), not real patient information. Minimum output requirements: PNG format, at least 100KB, at least 800x600 resolution.
